message:
🐛 Fix cache not persisting — OPFS fallback used in-memory SQLite (#2793)

Root cause: when OPFS wasn't available (non-HTTPS, browser restrictions),
the SQLite worker silently fell back to in-memory database (:memory:)
and reported success. The main thread used WorkerStorage thinking
data was persisted, but everything was lost on page reload.

Fix: when OPFS is unavailable, the worker now throws instead of
falling back to :memory:. This makes initCacheWorker() fail, which
triggers the IndexedDB fallback in the main thread — IndexedDB
actually persists data across page reloads.

This is why cards were always blank on browser refresh — the cache
was saving to /dev/null.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
